financial_notice.title: Financial Accountability
financial_notice.description: We strictly adhere to DepEd's policies on the utilization of MOOE (Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses). Physical copies of our monthly reports are also available at the School Administration Office in Upper Labay High School.
